expectations: Gathers requirements before drafting — asks about task domain, use cases, scripts, and reference materials
Does not produce a SKILL.md before understanding the requirements
Asks questions one at a time or as a grouped set before proceeding
Presents draft for review and asks whether it covers the use cases

evals.prompt:
/write-a-skill

I want a skill that helps agents write database migrations safely
expectations: Splits detailed content to reference files if SKILL.md would exceed 100 lines
Review checklist is satisfied: triggers in description, no time-sensitive info, concrete examples
